chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 602 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2765/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mian Mumtaz Rabbani, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh along with SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP, Sukkur and Syed Quwat Ali Shah, Senior Auditor, District Accounts Office, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
